title: euphorbia dulcis var. viridiflora
intro: Euphorbia dulcis var. viridiflora, also known as the sweet spurge or bitter sweet spurge, is a plant species within the Euphorbia genus. This plant contains diterpenoid esters with medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia dulcis var. viridiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
